name: Oven French Toast
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Loaf French bread, in 1-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9-inch square baking dish heavily.
2. Place bread slices in the dish.
3. In a medium bowl, combine eggs, milk, half-and-half, vanilla, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Pour egg mixture over bread. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
4. To make the topping: The next day, blend butter, brown sugar, and maple syrup with a fork. Stir in pecans. Spread topping evenly over bread.
5. Bake, uncovered, in a preheated 350-degree oven until puffed and golden, about 40 minutes. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
